cities.name: Sydney
cities.notes: Opera House, Bondi Beach, Harbour Bridge climb and Blue Mountains

cities.name: Melbourne
cities.notes: Coffee culture, Hosier Lane street art, Great Ocean Road and galleries

cities.name: Cairns
cities.notes: Great Barrier Reef snorkeling, Daintree Rainforest and Cape Tribulation

cities.name: Brisbane
cities.notes: South Bank beach, Lone Pine koala sanctuary and gateway to Gold Coast

cities.name: Perth
cities.notes: Fremantle port, Rottnest Island quokkas and Swan Valley wine region

cities.name: Uluru
cities.notes: Sacred Anangu red rock monolith at sunset and sunrise in the Red Centre
